title.en: England fan tickets for Mexico on resale for up to £26k
title.zh-CN: 转售墨西哥英格兰球迷票高达£ 26,000

summary.en: Tickets originally bought by England fans for Monday's last 16 game against Mexico are relisted for thousands of pounds on Fifa's official resale portal.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰球迷最初在周一对阵墨西哥的最后16场比赛中购买的门票在国际足联的官方转售门户网站上以数千英镑的价格重新上市。

title.en: Argentina v Cape Verde: Breaking down biggest World Cup knockout mismatch
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷对佛得角：打破世界杯最大的淘汰赛错位

summary.en: Lionel Messi versus Vozinha. It is the World Cup battle no-one knew they wanted, but which fans now cannot wait to see.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西对阵沃齐尼亚。这是一场没有人知道他们想要的世界杯比赛，但球迷们现在迫不及待地想看看。

title.en: Mexico's unlikely hero who England could fear most
title.zh-CN: 英格兰最害怕的墨西哥不太可能的英雄

summary.en: Julian Quinones' path to being a Mexican hero has been unorthodox - and he will hope to become a legend against England on Monday morning.
summary.zh-CN: 朱利安·奎诺内斯（ Julian Quinones ）成为墨西哥英雄的道路是非正统的-他希望在周一早上成为对阵英格兰的传奇。

title.en: Huge Snicko VAR call prolongs Ronaldo's last dance but ends Modric's
title.zh-CN: 巨大的Snicko VAR通话延长了罗纳尔多的最后一支舞，但结束了莫德里奇的

summary.en: Veteran forward Cristiano Ronaldo gets another day on the World Cup stage after Croatia are denied a late equaliser by a huge VAR call.
summary.zh-CN: 老将前锋克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）在世界杯舞台上又获得了一天，因为克罗地亚队被一个巨大的VAR电话拒绝了迟到的均衡器。

title.en: BBC offers 'Stay Up or Catch Up' for England v Mexico
title.zh-CN: 英国广播公司为英格兰v墨西哥提供“Stay Up or Catch Up”

summary.en: The BBC will be launching a special 'Stay Up or Catch Up' offer for its live coverage of England's game against Mexico at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司将推出一项特别的“Stay Up or Catch Up”优惠，以现场报道英格兰队在2026年世界杯对阵墨西哥队的比赛。

title.en: 'You can't breathe' - What is it like playing at altitude?
title.zh-CN: “你无法呼吸” -在海拔高度玩游戏是什么感觉？

summary.en: BBC pundits Rachel Corsie and Lucas Leiva explain their experiences of playing football at altitude, ahead of England's game at Estadio Azteca against Mexico which sits 2,240 metres above sea level.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司专家雷切尔·科西（ Rachel Corsie ）和卢卡斯·莱瓦（ Lucas Leiva ）在英格兰阿兹特克体育场（ Estadio Azteca ）对阵海拔2240米的墨西哥队比赛之前，介绍了他们在高空踢足球的经历。
